'''thamama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideousness|hideousness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideousness|hideousness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thamama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæmæmæth|thæmæmæth]] || [[word:thæmæmæj|thæmæmæj]] || [[word:thæmæmæsh|thæmæmæsh]] || [[word:thæmæmæ|thæmæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thamamamath|thamamamath]] || [[word:thamamamaj|thamamamaj]] || [[word:thamamamash|thamamamash]] || [[word:thamamama|thamamama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamamath|thamamath]] || [[word:thamamaj|thamamaj]] || [[word:thamamash|thamamash]] || [[word:thamama|thamama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamafmafth|thamafmafth]] || [[word:thamafmafj|thamafmafj]] || [[word:thamafmafsh|thamafmafsh]] || [[word:thamafmaf|thamafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thamamatha|thamamatha]] || [[word:thamamaja|thamamaja]] || [[word:thamamasha|thamamasha]] || [[word:thamamaka|thamamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thamamath|thamamath]] || [[word:thamamaj|thamamaj]] || [[word:thamamash|thamamash]] || [[word:thamama|thamama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thamamathal|thamamathal]] || [[word:thamamajal|thamamajal]] || [[word:thamamashal|thamamashal]] || [[word:thamamakal|thamamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thamamaathatha|thamamaathatha]] || [[word:thamamaajaja|thamamaajaja]] || [[word:thamamaashasha|thamamaashasha]] || [[word:thamamaaka|thamamaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thamamathan|thamamathan]] || [[word:thamamajan|thamamajan]] || [[word:thamamashan|thamamashan]] || [[word:thamamakan|thamamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thamamathaoro|thamamathaoro]] || [[word:thamamajaoro|thamamajaoro]] || [[word:thamamashaoro|thamamashaoro]] || [[word:thamamakaoro|thamamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
